title: Install remediation bullet proof loop
acceptanceCriteria: Install finalization can represent a problem statement and one or more separate remediation points.
Plain-text install output renders remediation points as distinct items rather than merging them into the same sentence as the problem.
TUI final screen renders the same remediation points distinctly.
Install JSON includes the remediation points in structured finalization items.
Existing warning/reuse/conflict/manual classification stays intact and regression tests pass.
